findings.title: Unauthenticated user profile access with sensitive data exposure
findings.description: User profile handler returns full user object including SSN and salary without requiring authentication

findings.title: Insecure direct object reference in asset access
findings.description: Authenticated users can access any asset by ID including serial numbers and values without ownership authorization

findings.title: Client-controlled role header for admin authorization
findings.description: Admin endpoint uses client-supplied X-User-Role header instead of server-side session role for authorization

findings.title: Missing authorization check on role update endpoint
findings.description: Any authenticated user can change any user's role including self-promotion to admin without authorization check

findings.title: Unauthenticated debug endpoint exposing secrets and AWS credentials
findings.description: Debug config handler accessible without authentication returns database credentials, app secret, and AWS access keys
